name: SO(10) GUT
summary: Embeds the SM into SO(10), unifying all SM fermions of one generation (plus a right-handed neutrino) into a single 16-dimensional spinor representation. Naturally accommodates seesaw-scale Majorana neutrinos and contains B-L as a gauge symmetry. Provides a UV embedding for type-I seesaw + leptogenesis with reduced free parameters.

addresses_puzzles.note: SUSY-SO(10) gives clean coupling unification; non-SUSY SO(10) with intermediate left-right symmetric step at ~10^12 GeV also works.
Right-handed neutrino is automatically present in 16; intermediate B-L breaking sets the seesaw scale.
SU(5)-like Yukawa relations extended to neutrino sector; minimal SO(10) with type-I+II seesaw fits all fermion masses with ~12 parameters.
Provides natural setting for leptogenesis with M_R fixed by intermediate symmetry breaking.

touches_benchmarks.note: Dimension-6 operators predict p -> e+ pi^0 at level ~10^33-10^35 yr, partially overlapping with Super-K and Hyper-K target sensitivity.

introduces.note: GUT scale, intermediate scales, Higgs sector, Yukawa structure.

history: Fritzsch-Minkowski (1975); Georgi (1975). Active research direction: minimal SO(10) Yukawa fits (Joshipura-Patel and others) test specific predictions of fermion mass relations including theta_13.

references.citation: Fritzsch and Minkowski, 'Unified interactions of leptons and hadrons', Annals Phys. 93, 193 (1975)
